_comment: Kush's Code MCP Configuration — mirrors ~/.claude/mcp.json with Kush-specific notes
_usage: These MCPs are available in every Kush's Code session (shared with ~/.claude/mcp.json)

filesystem._when: Read/write files in ~/Projects — use for all file operations

sequential-thinking._when: ANY task with 3+ steps — activate automatically for architecture/debugging

playwright._when: Browser automation, E2E testing, web scraping

context7._when: Library docs, API references — check before implementing any library usage

fetch._when: Fetch URLs, read web pages, download content

duckduckgo-search._when: Web search — primary search tool (Brave not configured)

mem0._when: Cross-session memory — query at EVERY session start for project context

mcp-memory-service._when: Knowledge graph — persist entities and relationships across sessions

huggingface._when: HF model search, dataset lookup, model cards — for NLP/ML tasks

ollama-mcp._when: Use Ollama as a TOOL from within Claude Code — offload mechanical subtasks to local model

_active_rule: Never build UI from scratch without checking magic-ui MCP first
_sequential_thinking_rule: Use sequential-thinking for ANY architecture decision, debugging chain, or 3+ step research
